headline: Why Is Ball (BALL) Down 0.1% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Ball (BALL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Beiersdorf moves to fully recycled aluminium cans in Europe
summary: The change, which started as a pilot project in 2024, was expanded across the region last year.
